title: geranium longicaule
intro: Geranium longicaule, also known as the Australian geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family. The medicinal properties of Geranium longicaule include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Geranium longicaule often include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
